# BrandKraf

> BrandKraf is a digital marketing agency based in Cheras, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. We help businesses grow with social media management, UGC content creation, paid advertising, branding, website development, AI-driven marketing, TikTok Live, KOC/KOL campaigns, and chatbot development. Trusted by 200+ brands across Malaysia and Southeast Asia.

## Services
- [Social Media Management](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/social-media-management): Strategic content planning and community management across all platforms.
- [UGC Content Creation](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/ugc-content-creation): Authentic user-generated video content that drives engagement and conversions.
- [Paid Advertising](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/paid-advertising): Data-driven ad campaigns on Meta, TikTok, and Google.
- [Website Development](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/website-development): High-converting websites built for performance.
- [Branding & Creative](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/branding-creative): Complete brand identity and creative design.
- [KOC/KOL Service](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/koc-kol-service): Influencer collaborations to amplify brand reach.
- [TikTok Live Service](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/tiktok-live-service): Live streaming sessions to boost real-time sales.
- [AI-Driven Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/ai-driven-marketing): AI to optimize strategy, predict trends, and maximize ROI.
- [Chatbot Development](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/chatbot-development): Conversational agents that qualify leads and automate support.

- [Pricing](https://www.brandkraf.com/pricing): Service packages and pricing.
